reasoning: This animation sequence for the 🆒 emoji aims to represent a feeling of coolness and nonchalant confidence.  The animation will use a combination of arm movements to convey this feeling. The sequence starts with the robot's arms at its sides, then moves into a pose that suggests a confident, slightly aloof stance. The arms will then return to a relaxed position.  The movement will be fluid but not excessively dramatic. We will use the robot's two-jointed arms to create the illusion of a relaxed but stylish pose. Frame 1 shows the arms at rest, Frame 2 brings the arms into a position that is slightly raised and angled outward, suggesting a relaxed confidence.
